name: Negroni
desc: The benchmark. Equal parts, no compromise.
method: Stir with ice until cold. Strain into a rocks glass over a large cube. Orange peel.

name: Martini
method: Stir with ice until very cold. Strain into a chilled coupe. Lemon twist or olive.

name: Manhattan
desc: The one that stays with you.
method: Stir with ice. Strain into a coupe. Brandied cherry.

name: Old Fashioned
method: Muddle sugar, bitters, and water. Add bourbon and ice, stir. Orange peel.

name: Daiquiri
desc: Three ingredients. Perfect when they're right.
method: Shake with ice. Double-strain into a chilled coupe. No garnish.

name: Margarita
desc: The only one worth ordering anywhere.
method: Shake with ice. Strain into a rocks glass over ice. Half-salted rim optional.

name: Sazerac
desc: New Orleans in a glass. The rinse matters.
method: Rinse a chilled rocks glass with absinthe, discard. Muddle sugar and bitters, add rye and ice, stir. Strain in. Express lemon peel over top.

name: Gimlet
desc: Simple, bright, and better than you remember.
method: Shake with ice. Strain into a chilled coupe. Lime wheel.
